prompt: Ultra-realistic portrait photography of a young woman with long wavy dark brown hair, wearing an oversized vintage brown leather jacket, standing outdoors in front of a rustic stone wall during golden hour. She covers most of her face with one hand placed vertically over her eyes and nose, creating a mysterious aesthetic. Fresh colorful flowers are attached to her hand and fingers: a deep purple flower centered on the hand, a bright red flower on one finger, and a soft pink flower near the wrist. A pale pink daisy-like flower is tucked behind her ear. Warm sunlight illuminates her hair and jacket from the side, creating rich highlights, soft shadows, and cinematic contrast. Natural skin texture, realistic hair strands, shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh, moody editorial fashion style, candid composition, soft earthy tones, highly detailed, DSLR photography, 85mm lens, f/1.8, photorealistic, ultra sharp focus, 8K quality, natural outdoor lighting, luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, vertical portrait, centered composition.
